hero.title: Imiklamo yekufinyeleleka kwemphakatsi
hero.lead: Lelirekhodi lichaza imiklamo yemphakatsi legcinwe nge-IATF. Imiklamo leyemukelwe yekufinyeleleka, sakhiwonchanti sendzawo, kanye nemiklamo lemisiwe igcinwa ibonakala lapha.

intro: Lemiklamo lemukelekile ibhalwe lapha ngemuva kwekushicilelwa.

header.title: Kugucula sidzingo lesicinile sekufinyeleleka sibe ngumklamo wemphakatsi

paragraphs: I-IATF ibuketa tidzingo leticondzile tekutfolakala kwetinhlelo letingaguculwa tibe ngumsebenti losemtsetfweni losisekelo lesivulekile.

emptyState.title: Kute umsebenti loshicilelwe
paragraphs: I-IATF ilungiselela luhlelo lwayo lwekucala lwemiklamo yemphakatsi.
Ungachubeka nekutfumela sicelo nangabe unetidzingo letitsite tekutsi ufinyeleleke.
